title: What Scripture actually says about putting sin to death
caption:
Managing sin keeps it alive.

The Bible doesn't call you to moderate it or reduce it. It calls you to kill it. The porn, the laziness, the cowardice — whatever version of you comes out when nobody's watching.

Here's what that actually looks like when a man gets serious.

#faith #scripture #sin #christianmen #godlymanhood #discipline #ethos
